description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a bulging cylindrical shape, constructed from vertical wooden staves bound together by five evenly spaced black metal hoops. The wood grain is clearly visible, giving it a natural, rustic appearance, while the metal bands provide structural reinforcement and a contrasting visual accent. The top is open, revealing the interior, which appears to be hollow and lined with the same wood material as the exterior. The rim of the barrel is slightly thicker, suggesting durability and resistance to chipping. There are no visible handles, lids, or markings on the surface. This type of barrel is commonly used for storage or transport of liquids or dry goods in urban, industrial, or garden settings.
description: A wooden barrel with black metal hoops, open at the top, featuring visible wood grain and a sturdy, rustic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top, wood grain, and five black metal hoops encircling the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curvature of the barrel and the even spacing of the metal hoops.
description_view_2: Another angled view displaying the open top and the continuous wood texture with metal reinforcement.
description_view_3: Rear view similar to the front, with clear visibility of the wood staves and metal hoops.
